title.en: A one-star god will be surprised.

content.en:
"Doppelganger? It's not that it's detached, it requires the consummation of the physical body, how can the Phantom Feather God have so many doppelgangers, and how can he be detached if he has a doppelganger?"

A one-star god will be surprised.

Many strong people in the universe have the art of clones, but no matter how many clones there are, if you want to be detached, you must annihilate the doppelganger, and the soul must return to the whole body, leaving only the body, so that you can impact the realm of transcendence.

But just now, the Phantom Feather God was bombarded and killed one by one, which was too surprising.

"That's not a clone!" said the sun god, "That's a puppet body, and it's a very special puppet body, made of countless precious materials, it doesn't have much attack power, but its defense is very strong. The Phantom Feather God will use his soul to manipulate these puppets to block the Thunder Tribulation for himself, but it is not very useful, and he will not be able to stop the 26th Thunder Tribulation at all. However, the Phantom Feather God General's own foundation is still very strong, and he barely survived the 26th Thunder Tribulation bombardment!"

"Puppet, I see!"

Many gods will come to their senses.

"Foreign objects are foreign objects after all, and if the Phantom Feather God only relies on foreign objects, he will not be able to survive the last thunder tribulation at all!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It can even be said that the Phantom Feather God General who has just survived the 26th Thunder Tribulation is already close to a state of frequent death, and his combat power has been sharply reduced by more than ninety to nine, what can he do to survive the 27th Thunder Tribulation?

Soon, the 27th Thunder Tribulation came, and the Chaos Gods and Demons it transformed into far exceeded the 26th Thunder Tribulation, almost more than twice as many as the 26th Thunder Tribulation.

Under this blow, many gods will think that it will be almost impossible for the Phantom Feather God to live.

Then at this moment, the Phantom Feather God General swallowed an elixir, and the whole person instantly returned to his peak state.

Obviously, this is an extremely precious elixir, which is by no means produced in the universe, but from chaos.

But it is still only to return to its peak state, but it is still impossible to resist the 27th Thunder Tribulation, if there is no other means, the heyday and dying state will undoubtedly be killed by a single blow.

Suddenly.

The Phantom Feather God General seems to have performed some kind of secret technique, and the whole person's spirit and spirit burned nearly half, turning into a phoenix covering the entire Phantom Mountain, this is not a phoenix in the universe, but a phoenix containing the qi of chaos, and it is a certain phoenix race in the chaos.

After turning into a phoenix, the aura of the Phantom Feather Divine General was almost about to break the limit of the three-star peak divine general, which was equivalent to half a four-star divine general.

And its recovery power and defense are probably enough to rival the weaker four-star god generals.

Bang!!!!

The blow of the 27th Thunder Tribulation descended, directly blasting the Phantom Feather God General into the depths of the Phantom Mountain.

I saw that the Phantom Feather God General was almost pierced through his body, and countless wounds were cracked all over his body, and the whole person was almost shattered.

But the vitality of the Phantom Feather Divine General is still there, and it has not been completely annihilated.

In short, the Phantom Feather God General did not die, he survived the catastrophe of the Transcendent.

Many people don't understand, what kind of means is the last phoenix that the Phantom Feather God will turn into, the Phantom Feather God is obviously not a phoenix clan, and he has never heard of any phoenix bloodline, how can he become such a powerful phoenix?

Ye Tian understood that his Life Heavenly Pupil could allow him to see through the vitality of the Phantom Feather Divine General.

There is a completely different aura of vitality in the body of the Phantom Feather God General, which comes from a drop of blood, that is, the true blood of the Chaos Phoenix, this drop of true blood contains a very terrifying power, and it is sealed in the body of the Phantom Feather God General.

And just now, the Phantom Feather God General used a forbidden technique to forcibly urge this drop of true blood, turning into a Chaos Phoenix, blocking the 27th Thunder Tribulation, thus surviving the Tribulation of the Transcendent.

Casting this gate control technique, and forcibly urging that drop of true blood, the Phantom Feather God General is now almost dying, and even the foundation is damaged.

But the Phantom Feather God will be detached, if he enters the chaos and is transformed into a chaotic life by the chaotic qi, the foundation will naturally be made up.

Therefore, it is extremely cost-effective for the Phantom Feather God to do this.

Wow!!!

Countless vitality poured into the Phantom Feather God General's body to repair his injuries, and the Phantom Feather God took out all the healing pills in his body to quickly recover from his injuries.

At the same time, the aura of the Phantom Feather Divine General became stronger and stronger, which was a breaking realm.

However, the Phantom Feather God General is still not a Heavenly Mandate Heavenly Monarch, but can only be regarded as a pseudo-Heavenly Destiny Realm, because he has not yet transformed his body into a chaotic life, only the divine power has been transformed into the power of chaos, and it is not completely transformed, but only partially transformed.

But even so, the strength of the Phantom Feather God General has become extremely powerful, almost reaching the four-star peak God General's combat power.

It's a pity that he is no longer a god general.

In the new universe, the Phantom Feather God, who is second on the list of gods, has disappeared.

......

"Everyone, after ten years, I will be beyond the Cangyu universe, during this time, I can preach the transcendent understanding, if you are willing to listen, you can listen to it in the Illusory Mountain!"

The Phantom Feather God will preach.

For a moment, many earthly deities and gods will rejoice.

Transcendent perception is also good for them, although after the two universes merge into the big universe, there is almost no hope of detachment, but it is not without the hope of detachment.

Besides, with tens of thousands of years to go, who knows what will change?

So, they were all very interested.

A few days later, the Phantom Feather God will preach detached, and many gods will listen carefully, even Ye Tian will stay here to listen.

In the blink of an eye, it is 100,000 years past.

Just as the Phantom Feather God was about to leave, the Sun God spoke: "Today, I will also detach, so I will leave with the Phantom Feather Heavenly Monarch!"

"What?"

A group of gods will be stunned.

The Phantom Feather God will be separated from the super, what is the situation?

Others may not know about the Phantom Feather Divine General, but some of the Divine Generals of the Cangyu Universe do!

The Phantom Feather God General's strength has indeed improved very quickly recently, and now it is already the strength of the mid-three-star God General, but it is not as good as the Phantom Feather God General!

Moreover, the Phantom Feather God will not be a rebel!

Non-rebels, although there is no danger of thunderstorms, but the difficulty of detachment is far greater than that of the rebels!

The cause and effect of the Rebel and the Origin of the Universe are very small, and the Origin of the Universe is difficult to control the Rebel, but the Phantom Feather God will be too deep in the cause and effect of the Origin of the Universe, and it will be controlled too deeply by the Origin of the Universe.

Therefore, the strength of the Phantom Feather Divine General, who is only a three-star mid-stage Divine General, can't shake the long river of time and space at all, how can he transcend?

Now, the secret of detachment is no longer a secret, and if the Phantom Feather God wants to be detached, at least he must have five or six star god generals, or even a higher level.

"Sun God General, are you kidding?"

Long Ze said coldly.

Long Ze is a three-star late-stage god general, and his strength has improved very quickly, and now he ranks third on the list of god generals, he has no hope of detachment, but the sun god general dares to say that he wants to be detached, and he seems to be full of confidence.

Isn't that a joke!
